### Your website has changes waiting for you

**Step 1. Look at them here first:**
https://trialignprotocol.github.io/site-previews/drrichchiro/

That is a private staging copy of your site. Google does not index it and it is not
your live site. Click around it exactly like a visitor would.

**Step 2. If it looks right**, click the green **Merge pull request** button at the
bottom of this page. Your live site at https://drrichchiro.com updates about a minute later.

**Step 3. If something looks wrong**, do not merge. Reply on this page and say what
you want changed. A new preview appears here automatically.

Nothing reaches the public until you click Merge. You are the only one who can.
